creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 157349
Patch

- Add CPE info
- Add NO_ARCH
- Modernize plist

what bugs me is that poudriere testport reports modified directory permissions:

...
====>> Checking for extra files and directories
====>> Error: Files or directories modified:
/var/spool/%%NAGIOSUSER%% permissions (0775, 0755)
build of net-mgmt/nagiosql ended at Mon Jun  1 20:08:21 MSK 2015
build time: 00:00:12
!!! build failure encountered !!!
...

however nagiosql does not touch this directory at all, so it may be unrelated problem.
